notes: E5d spans TWO APIs: Tenant API (port 5100) for stories E5d-1/E5d-2, Platform API (port 5101) for stories E5d-3/E5d-4
Tenant API RBAC users: admin@nexa-erp.dev (SUPER_ADMIN), manager@nexa-erp.dev (MANAGER), staff@nexa-erp.dev (STAFF), viewer@nexa-erp.dev (VIEWER) — password: NexaDev2026!
Platform API uses platform JWT auth with PLATFORM_ADMIN role — separate auth flow
Invalid UUID for validation tests: not-a-uuid
Knowledge article categories: BUSINESS_PROCESS, TERMINOLOGY, INDUSTRY_RULES, CUSTOM_FIELDS, HISTORICAL_PATTERN
Knowledge article sources: ADMIN_UPLOADED, AI_GENERATED, PLATFORM_SUGGESTED, CORRECTION_DERIVED
Training example categories: same 5 as knowledge articles
Correction types: TERMINOLOGY, PROCESS, DATA, PREFERENCE, OTHER
Platform knowledge categories: BEST_PRACTICE, HELP, DEFAULT_CONFIG, SKILL_UPDATE
Platform knowledge statuses: DRAFT, PUBLISHED, ARCHIVED

entity_discovery.description: Before running tests, discover real entity IDs

steps.purpose: Get admin JWT token for Tenant API

steps.action: Authenticate to Platform API as PLATFORM_ADMIN

endpoints.description: Create a knowledge article with chunking and embedding pipeline

body.title: Test Knowledge Article for E5d
body.content: This is a test knowledge article with enough content to demonstrate the chunking pipeline. The article covers business processes for handling VAT codes in the UK.

db_verification.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as chunk_count FROM ai_knowledge_chunks WHERE article_id = '{{created_article_id}}'

body.title: Company Terminology Guide
body.content: VAT code 3 means reverse charge for EU purchases in our company.

body.title: Construction Retention Rules
body.content: In construction, retention invoices hold 5% for 12 months per standard contract terms.

endpoints.description: Create a training example (input/output pair for few-shot injection)

body.inputText: What VAT code should I use for EU purchases?
body.outputText: Use reverse charge — VAT code 3. This applies to all EU B2B purchases.

db_verification.query: SELECT source, is_active FROM ai_training_examples WHERE id = '{{created_example_id}}'

body.outputText: Process via credit note, not void. Use the Credit Note action.

test_execution_order.description: Recommended execution order: creates first, then reads, then updates, then deletes

phases.name: Authentication
phases.description: Login as all test users to get tokens
test_ids: Login all 4 tenant roles + platform admin + service token

phases.description: Create knowledge articles and training examples

phases.name: Deletes (Tenant API)
phases.description: Delete operations (run last for tenant API)

phases.description: List and get operations for intelligence and knowledge
